name: AstroNova, Inc.
business: AstroNova designs, develops, manufactures, and distributes specialty printers and data acquisition and analysis systems, including hardware and software, for markets such as aerospace, apparel, automotive, and packaging. Its Product Identification segment sells digital label printers and supplies under QuickLabel, TrojanLabel, AstroJet, and GetLabels brands, while its Aerospace segment provides flight deck printers, Ethernet networking products, and test/measurement systems under the AstroNova brand.

exposures.sentence: We are currently supplying ToughWriter printers for a range of commercial and business aircraft platforms including those manufactured by Airbus, Boeing, Embraer, Lockheed, Gulfstream, and others.
Aerospace revenue in fiscal 2026... defense market sales which increased $1.1 million or 43.1% from prior year
Our data acquisition systems are used in ... missile/rocket telemetry
Our data acquisition systems are used in ... production monitoring
Product ID products ... are used by brand owners and commercial printers to provide product packaging, marketing, tracking, branding, and labeling solutions to a wide array of industries.

If we are unable to incorporate artificial intelligence and other emerging technological applications into our business operations successfully and ethically, our business, reputation and results of operations may be adversely affected.
We could experience a significant disruption in, or a security breach of, our information technology system, which could harm our business and adversely affect our results of operations.

catalysts.event: Review of strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value announced
catalysts.sentence: On April 7, 2026, we announced that our board of directors (the Board ) will perform a review and evaluation of strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value.

catalysts.event: Restructuring actions announced including workforce reduction and MTEX product line realignment
catalysts.sentence: On March 20, 2025, we announced our restructuring actions for fiscal 2026, which included reducing approximately 10% of the Company s global workforce, primarily in the Product ID segment, and the realignment of our underperforming MTEX operation in Portugal.

catalysts.event: Completion of Airbus A320 platform transition to ToughWriter printers
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2026, we completed the transition of the Airbus A320 platform to ToughWriter printers.
We anticipate completing the plan by the second quarter of fiscal 2027.
